<!-- source-hash: fa4bd55072ca1ab72234ddec865cf401 -->
REST API controller exposing CRUD endpoints for Organization resources at `/api/v1/organizations`, supporting filtering, cursor-based pagination, and sorting for external integrations.

## Key Components

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/organizations` | List organizations with filtering, search, and cursor pagination |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/organizations/{id}` | Retrieve organization by database ID |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/organizations/by-organization-id/{organizationId}` | Retrieve organization by business identifier |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/organizations` | Create a new organization |
| `PUT` | `/api/v1/organizations/{id}` | Update an existing organization |

**Dependencies injected:**
- `OrganizationService` — data-layer lookups
- `OrganizationQueryService` — filtered/paginated queries
- `OrganizationCommandService` — create/update commands
- `OrganizationMapper` — entity-to-DTO mapping

## Usage Example

```java
// GET /api/v1/organizations?category=MSP&limit=10&sortField=name&sortDirection=ASC
// Headers: X-API-Key-Id: <key>

// Create organization
POST /api/v1/organizations
Content-Type: application/json
X-API-Key-Id: <key>

{
  "name": "Acme Corp",
  "category": "MSP",
  "employees": 50
}

// Response: 201 Created
{
  "id": "org_abc123",
  "organizationId": "acme-corp",
  "name": "Acme Corp",
  "status": "ACTIVE"
}
```

**Filter parameters supported on `GET /api/v1/organizations`:**
- `category`, `status` (ACTIVE / ARCHIVED)
- `minEmployees`, `maxEmployees`
- `hasActiveContract` (boolean)
- `search` (name + category full-text)
- `cursor`, `limit` (1–100, default 20)
- `sortField`, `sortDirection` (ASC / DESC)
